# MuleSoft Microsoft Dynamics NAV Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.0) of Microsoft Dynamics NAV Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Dynamics NAV Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-nav-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Dynamics NAV Connector documentation in one file.
